## Summary
- Added Dart FFI bridge bindings for native connection, disconnect, Dart DL initialization, NativePort frame stream start/stop, and mouse input functions.
- Added NativePort frame stream startup through `rc_initialize_dart_api(NativeApi.initializeApiDLData)` before `rc_frame_stream_start`.
- Added C ABI exports for client disconnect, frame stream lifecycle, Dart DL initialization, and mouse events while keeping `rc_api.cpp` validation/delegation-only.
- Added Runtime-owned frame-stream worker thread that posts capture frames to Dart via `Dart_PostCObject_DL` when `dart_api_dl.h` is available.
- Added `ConnectionHistory` service so `HomeScreen` does not own persistence.
- Replaced Flutter counter scaffold with `HomeScreen` and `ViewerScreen`.
- Added `InputForwarder` for tap/drag forwarding to `rc_send_mouse_*` bindings.
